name: Triplit
description: Triplit — Full-stack database with client-side cache, optimistic updates, and real-time server sync.

seo.title: Triplit — DBaaS / Serverless Databases
seo.meta_description: Triplit: Triplit — Full-stack database with client-side cache, optimistic updates, and real-time server sync.

when_to_use: Full-stack database with real-time sync and offline support
Client-side cache with automatic conflict resolution on sync
Local-first app database with TypeScript schema definitions
Replacing Firebase with a type-safe relational-ish sync layer
Collaborative apps with optimistic UI and server reconciliation

pros: Full-stack DB with real-time sync and cache
Optimistic updates feel instant in UI
cons: Production scale story still being proven
Limited backend flexibility vs general SQL
review.verdict: Promising local-first DB for TypeScript apps needing real-time sync, still early for heavy production commitment.
review.best_for: TypeScript teams building collaborative or offline-first apps prototyping fast
review.not_for: Mature products needing large-scale backend flexibility and proven ops tooling
